style_effects: Constant static sparks of electric blue and white streak across Clefairy's soft pink fur, drifting upward in erratic bursts like miniature lightning bolts. A vibrant, pulsing electric aura in neon cyan surrounds its body, distorting the air with subtle electromagnetic ripples, while its eyes and tail emit a steady, bright yellow glow that casts sharp, energetic shadows. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
